title: Quantum Graph Coloring Algorithms
description: Learn quantum approaches to graph coloring problems including k-coloring, chromatic number estimation, and QAOA-based coloring heuristics.
learningObjectives: Understand the graph coloring problem and its NP-completeness
Formulate graph coloring as a QUBO problem
Implement QAOA for graph coloring optimization
Apply Grover search to find valid colorings
Analyze quantum speedups for coloring problems
Compare quantum vs classical coloring heuristics
